summary: Docker buildx bake build failed when wget attempted to download a Nydus release artifact from GitHub, receiving an HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway error. Multiple network-level fetch failures followed, causing the buildkit solver to cancel with context canceled.
root_cause: The wget command failed to download https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz due to HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway, indicating a transient issue on the remote server. Subsequent image fetch attempts also failed with network errors, causing the buildkit solver to cancel the operation.

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: Direct evidence of HTTP 502 error during wget download, indicating transient remote server issue

evidence.quote: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully
evidence.reason: Buildx bake process failed due to the wget command not completing, confirming the download was the blocking failure

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully
evidence.reason: Final GitHub Actions error report traces back to the wget failure

evidence.quote: time="2026-05-06T19:55:11Z" level=debug msg="fetch failed" digest="sha256:0288b5a0d7e71a2cdbdf114cb9869ce2bc4b05adfd6aa5e3ee9fa4b3847e7b80" error="failed to do request: Get
evidence.reason: Additional network fetch failures at the same timestamp confirm widespread network issues during the build

suggested_fix: Retry the build. The 502 Bad Gateway error is a transient remote server issue, not a problem with the build configuration or code. If retries continue to fail, verify that the dragonflyoss/nydus release exists and is downloadable, or consider implementing retry logic in the build script.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
